tasks.label: Larrick: Branch Policy Check (Current Branch)
tasks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, subprocess
branch = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'rev-parse', '--abbrev-ref', 'HEAD'], text=True).strip()
cmd = f'git checkout -b {branch}'
proc = subprocess.run(['bash', 'scripts/worktree_agent/branch_policy_guard.sh'], input=json.dumps({'command': cmd}), text=True)
raise SystemExit(proc.returncode)
PY
